description: Authenticates a user and establishes a session via HTTP-only cookie.
Logs out the current user by clearing the authentication cookie.

responseSchema: { workDuration: number; shortBreakDuration: number; longBreakDuration: number; pomodorosBeforeLongBreak: number; }
description: Retrieves the authenticated user's Pomodoro settings.

requestSchema: { workDuration: number; shortBreakDuration: number; longBreakDuration: number; pomodorosBeforeLongBreak: number; }
responseSchema: { workDuration: number; shortBreakDuration: number; longBreakDuration: number; pomodorosBeforeLongBreak: number; }
description: Updates the authenticated user's Pomodoro settings.

requestSchema: { type: 'work' | 'short_break' | 'long_break'; duration: number; startTime: string; endTime: string; }
responseSchema: { id: string; userId: string; type: 'work' | 'short_break' | 'long_break'; duration: number; startTime: string; endTime: string; createdAt: string; }
description: Records a completed Pomodoro session for the authenticated user.

responseSchema: { id: string; userId: string; type: 'work' | 'short_break' | 'long_break'; duration: number; startTime: string; endTime: string; createdAt: string; }[]
description: Retrieves a list of completed Pomodoro sessions for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by date range.

responseSchema: { totalWorkSessions: number; totalBreakSessions: number; totalWorkTime: number; totalBreakTime: number; dailyStats: { date: string; workSessions: number; workTime: number; }[]; weeklyStats: { week: string; workSessions: number; workTime: number; }[]; monthlyStats: { month: string; workSessions: number; workTime: number; }[]; }
description: Retrieves aggregated productivity statistics for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by date range.
